name: Spam Guard
description: Heuristic spam filtering for comments and contact form submissions with configurable strictness.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Enable spam filtering
settings.description: Screen incoming comments and contact messages for spam patterns.

settings.label: Filter strictness
settings.description: How aggressively to flag suspicious submissions.

settings.label: Flag keyword spam
settings.description: Use built-in and custom blocked word lists.

settings.label: Custom blocked words
settings.description: Comma-separated words that trigger spam rejection.

settings.label: Hold borderline comments
settings.description: Allow suspicious comments as pending instead of blocking outright.

settings.label: Filter contact messages
settings.description: Apply the same spam rules to contact form submissions.
